calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID WASSERMAN FOR PLAINTIFF LUCIANA GALLINA, ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT KEN SCHAEFFER IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD. DEFENDANT TO VACATE 1455 FILBERT STREET #205, BY 5PM 12/29/04. DEFENDANT TO PAY $4000 TO PLAINTIFF IN MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $500 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH, COMMENCING JANUARY 2005 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF DEFENDANT VACATES PREMISES TIMELY, WITHIN 5 DAYS OF FINAL PAYMENT, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND RELEASE ALL CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE A NEUTRAL REFERENCE.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLAINTIFF WILL GET A JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION, $8000, AND WRIT OF EXECUTION WITH NO STAYS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:GARY LOUIE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: BELDON YEE (218)
